en: not to pick the pirate booty up off the floor. And it's been bothering me.
ko: 너는 바닥에 있는 해적 보물을 주워오지 않겠다고 결정했는데, 그게 나를 괴롭히고 있어. 이게 농담이야?
ja: お前は海賊の宝を床から拾わないと決めた、それがずっと気になってる。
zhTW: 你決定不把海盜贓物從地上撿起來，這件事一直困擾著我。
vi: Ban da quyet dinh khong nhat chien loi pham cuop bien len tu san, va dieu do lam toi kho chiu.

en: Is this a joke? It's a simple question. Did you drop the pirate booty, and did you not?
ja: 海賊の宝を落としたのか、落としてないのか？
zhTW: 你到底有沒有掉落海盜贓物？
vi: Ban co lam roi chien loi pham cuop bien hay khong?

en: No, but who would tell you something so insane?
ko: 아니, 그런데 누가 그렇게 미친 소리를 하겠어? 누가 중요한 게 아니야.
ja: いいや、でも誰がそんなイカれたことを言うんだ？
zhTW: 沒有，但誰會告訴你這麼瘋狂的事？
vi: Khong, nhung ai noi voi ban dieu dien ro nhu vay?

en: The who's not important. It's very important. Look, it was a dog walker. Freddie who?
ja: とても重要だ。犬の散歩係だ。
zhTW: 很重要。是一個遛狗的人。
vi: Rat quan trong. La nguoi dan cho di dao.

en: It was a mutual friend. What does it matter? It was Larry David. Who? Oh, for fuck's sake.
ko: 그건 서로 아는 친구였어. 그게 뭐가 중요해?
ja: やったのはラリー・デイヴィッドだ。ああ、勘弁してくれ。
zhTW: 是Larry David幹的。哦，搞什麼鬼。
vi: Larry David lam do. Oi, that kinh khung.

en: Okay, and he said to me that he saw you in the office. Larry David. You eating? He couldn't choose between one and two.
ko: 그가 사무실에서 너를 봤다고 나한테 말했어. 래리 데이비드.
ja: 彼がオフィスでお前を見たと言ってた。ラリー・デイヴィッドが。
zhTW: 他跟我說他在辦公室看到你了。Larry David。
vi: Anh ta noi voi toi rang anh ta thay ban o van phong. Larry David.

en: Why is this about... One or two. Did you drop the pirate booty?
ja: なぜこれが…一つか二つ。
zhTW: 為什麼這是關於...一還是二。
vi: Tai sao lai noi ve... Mot hay hai.

en: He is Magoo. But what's his motivation? What would he gain from it?
ja: あいつは酔っぱらいだ。でも動機は何だ？
zhTW: 他喝醉了。但他的動機是什麼？
vi: Anh ta say roi. Nhung dong co cua anh ta la gi?

en: Freddie, don't you think if I noticed something that fell on the ground, I would pick it up? It's ridiculous.
ko: 내가 바닥에 떨어진 걸 봤다면, 주웠을 거라고 생각하지 않아? 말도 안 돼.
ja: 何かが地面に落ちたのに気づいたら、拾うと思わないか？
zhTW: 你不覺得如果我注意到東西掉在地上，我會撿起來嗎？
vi: Ban khong nghi la neu toi thay gi do roi xuong dat, toi se nhat len sao?

en: One would hope. One would hope. So I'm going to ask you one more time. That's it. Freddie.
ja: じゃあもう一回聞くぞ。
vi: Vay toi hoi ban them mot lan nua.

en: Did you drop the pirate booty? Yes. Okay.
ja: 海賊の宝を落としたのか？
zhTW: 你有沒有掉落海盜贓物？
vi: Ban co lam roi chien loi pham cuop bien khong?

en: Yes, I dropped the fucking pirate's booty, okay? Wasn't a big deal.
ko: 응, 나는 그 개 같은 해적 보물을 떨어뜨렸어. 알겠어?
ja: うん。わかった。ああ、クソ海賊の宝を落とした。いいだろ？
zhTW: 是的。好吧。是的，我掉了那該死的海盜贓物。好嗎？
vi: Phai. OK. Phai, toi da lam roi cai chien loi pham cuop bien chet tiet do. Duoc chua?

en: We have a team of people. I was busy. This is where we should have started.
ko: 여기서 시작했어야 했어. 그때는 신경 쓰지 않았어.
ja: 忙しかったんだ。ここから始めるべきだった。
zhTW: 我很忙。我們應該從這裡開始的。
vi: Toi ban. Le ra chung ta nen bat dau tu day.

en: Didn't care then, don't care now. Yeah, and you know what? Didn't want to pick it up.
ja: それにね？拾いたくなかったんだ。
zhTW: 你知道嗎？我不想撿起來。
vi: Va ban biet gi khong? Toi khong muon nhat no len.

en: Look what you put me through. What? I put you through? Yeah.
ja: 俺に何をさせたか見ろよ。
zhTW: 看看你讓我經歷了什麼。
vi: Nhin xem ban da lam toi phai chiu gi.

en: This is all fucking Larry David. No, it's not. Thank God for Larry David, because you'll grow from this.
ja: ああ。全部クソラリー・デイヴィッドのせいだ。
zhTW: 是的。這都是該死的Larry David搞的。
vi: U. Tat ca la do cai thang Larry David chet tiet.

en: Ew, you know what? I'm growing now. I'm out of here.
Oh, God. And you know what? You know what?
ja: それにね？拾いたくなかったんだ。
zhTW: 你知道嗎？我不想撿起來。
vi: Va ban biet gi khong? Toi khong muon nhat no len.
